entity.summary: Swiss on-chain equity issuance and trading platform providing issuer-hosted direct investment, secondary-market order books, smart-contract Brokerbot markets, and atomic settlement for tokenized company shares.
entity.notes: HEI models Aktionariat's platform, Brokerbot markets, SecondaryMarket contracts, direct-investment surfaces, and issuer-specific tokenized-share markets as one exchange entity. Classified as a DEX because the reviewed trading surfaces use blockchain smart contracts and atomic on-chain settlement; issuer administration and optional bank-payment support do not make the secondary exchange custodial.

evidence.title: Aktionariat tokenized equity trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party investor surface identifies Aktionariat as an end-to-end tokenized-equity platform and exposes direct investment plus secondary trading through an open order book and atomic on-chain settlement.

evidence.title: Aktionariat on-chain market metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero tokenized-equity DEX volume, TVL, fees, and revenue across Ethereum, Polygon, and OP Mainnet, corroborating active exchange operation.
